entry.title: Addressing the Diminishing Block Subsidy
entry.summary:
The email highlights a significant issue concerning the demand for block space within a specific community, emphasizing the historical prevalence of a low-fee environment. The sender expresses strong support for natural methods to increase block space demand but also acknowledges the necessity of having a strategic plan in place to address potential challenges. This approach underscores an awareness of the balance needed between maintaining accessible fees and ensuring the sustainability of block space usage.
Furthermore, the sender invites Pieter to share his preliminary, informal ideas on how to tackle this issue effectively. This invitation for collaboration indicates a proactive stance towards problem-solving in the community, suggesting that input from various stakeholders is valued in crafting a viable strategy. The discussion points towards exploring innovative or unorthodox solutions that could be initially conceptualized in simple formats, such as napkin sketches, before being developed into more detailed plans. This method of brainstorming is positioned as a crucial step in responding to the evolving needs related to block space management within the community.
